---
title: "Intellectual Debt: With Great Power Comes Great Ignorance"
description: "Jonathan Zittrain on the cost of knowledge without understanding."
author: "synesis"
date: "2019-07-28"
categories: [AI, ethics, society, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Intellectual Debt. Image from [Berkman Klein Center](https://medium.com/berkman-klein-center/from-technical-debt-to-intellectual-debt-in-ai-e05ac56a502c).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

"A world of knowledge without understanding becomes, to those of us living in it, a world without discernible cause and effect, and thus a world where we might become dependent on our own digital concierges to tell us what to do and when."


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_intellectual-debt-with-great-power-comes-activity-6561117767964196864-j8iQ).*
